24 P_REC_DT P_REC_DT Previous Record Date DATE 8 Previous Record Date
25 RSCHGTS RES_CHG_TIMESTAMP Resident Change Timestamp DATE 8 This is a timestamp indicating when the resident identifying information was changed. It is used to distinguish which version of the resident identifying information was in effect during a particular time period.
